cells.rationale: Epic's early-proof soundness task: relaxing tail equality while preserving byte-for-byte fail-closed for live/ambiguous claimants is a subtle correctness invariant (resume-after-terminal, cursor-freshness, per-session scoping) that hard-gates opus, at the contract-shaped xhigh band.

Bounded, well-specified extension atop task 1's landed classification — adds a typed outcome variant and narrows ownership_conflict — but it touches the CommitWorkOutcome union callers switch on and requires honest stalled-ingester judgment, so sonnet at the contract-touching xhigh band rather than opus.

Combines a security/correctness liveness invariant (pid+start-time gone-witness must never classify a suspended/unreadable process as gone, fail-closed) with a destructive identity-rechecked TERM-then-KILL operator verb and a judgment-heavy CONTEXT.md prune across many files — a clear opus gate at xhigh.

Publication CAS with selection-scoped drift exclusion carries a subtle security invariant (excluded-prefix exemption must not smuggle tracked mutations past the freeze) plus concurrency-shaped bounded rebase-retry over a moving ref — an intelligence-bound correctness case gating opus at the contract xhigh band.
